text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bump into Symboli Rudolf in front of the school
gates. She seems to be on her way out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer. What an unexpected surprise.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am. I was going to indulge in some... social
studies, I suppose you might call them.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You can accompany me, if you'd like. Assuming
you have no other obligations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With no other plans for the day, I decide to go
with Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The two of us eventually arrive at the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now, let's see... What is on the schedule today...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, not today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The racecourse hosts all manner of events in
addition to races.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They present good opportunities to gain insight
into the general public's perception of
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For that reason, I like to drop in and take a look
when I have the time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as this is your first time, why don't you
select the event?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf gestures to a noticeboard
covered in posters for various events.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Select whichever strikes your fancy and we'll go
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Two activities in particular stand out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Cleaning up the stands, hm? I'll lead the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Volunteers of all ages and backgrounds have
come to join the garbage cleanup.

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hello there! Aren't you the Tracen Academy
student council president?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I am. It's a pleasure to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the pleasure's all mine! It's such a joy to
watch you all on the track.

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
I come along to these cleanups as my own little
way of giving back.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you. That's very humbling to hear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf takes the opportunity to speak
with a variety of other volunteers as we work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every one of them harbors clear affection for the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf seems to take pleasure in
listening to what everyone has to say.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you for indulging me today.
choice_data_list: Not at all. I learned a lot.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to hear that. I feel the same.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I learned an important lesson today: our fans
support us in various ways, even when we aren't
racing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The next time I look out into the stands, it will be
with a different sense of appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the day draws to a close, I feel that I've gotten
a rare glimpse of what Symboli Rudolf values.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh? A limited-time exhibition of Umamusume
achievements... And as luck would have it, it
opens today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Surely this will be worth seeing. Shall we take a
look?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Entering the venue, it's clear at a glance that the
organizers have spared no effort.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see... They've collated the achievements of
famed Umamusume all around the world, not just
in races, but in the culture surrounding racing too.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame this exhibition is only temporary. The
organizers' passion for Umamusume is plain to
see.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I do wish it was better promoted, though. Perhaps
there's something we could do to help...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though subtle, there's a spark of joy in her eyes
as she surveys the exhibit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy all it has to offer, with Symboli Rudolf
occasionally chiming in as my personal guide.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My, it has gotten late. Still, that was an afternoon
well spent.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's important to remember that races are more
than just contests of skill. They're part of
Umamusume history and culture.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They form a great river of time and devotion,
flowing all the way from the distant past to the
present we and our fans inhabit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll see what I can do to have this exhibition
advertised around the academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you for indulging me today.
choice_data_list: Not at all. I learned a lot.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the day draws to a close, I feel that I've gotten
a rare glimpse of Symboli Rudolf's love for
knowledge.
